items.raw_desc: Egyensúlyozó félgömb Lifefit Balance Ball 58 cm, fekete:Lifefit BALANCE BALL is a versatile balance mat that contributes to the development of coordination and balance, strengthening of deep stabilizing muscles and correct posture. Exercise helps reduce stress, muscle tension and helps relieve back and joint pain. The flexible handles make it easy to exercise your upper and lower limb muscles. The mat can be used with the air chamber facing upwards as well as towards the ground, and by dropping or adding pressure in the air chamber it is possible to adjust the difficulty of the exercises. The Lifefit BALANCE BALL is made of durable PVC and its base is made of hardened ABS thermoplastic polymer. The base has an anti-slip treatment, thanks to which the mat will stay in place even during demanding exercises. A foot pump for inflation is also included.
